summary: Phase 3 (Forms, Tasks, HR) comprehensive testing completed. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing revealed and fixed critical API URL issues (double /api/ prefix). All 6 Phase 3 pages are now fully functional.

minor.issue: GET and PATCH for individual tasks not implemented - only /complete endpoint exists

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - All Phase 3 pages had double /api/ prefix in API calls (e.g., /api/api/forms/templates)

critical_code_review_comments: API URL pattern inconsistency: The api.js utility already adds /api prefix to baseURL, but Phase 3 pages were adding /api again. This was fixed in all 6 pages.
Backend HR endpoints use /hr/time-off-requests and /hr/time-off-policies, not /hr/requests and /hr/policies
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_ prefixed data for form templates, submissions, tasks, and task templates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 testing complete. All 6 pages (FormBuilderPage, FormsManagementPage, StaffFormsPage, FormSubmissionPage, TaskDashboardPage, TimeOffPage) are working. API URL fixes applied - remember that api.js already adds /api prefix, so page code should use paths like /forms/templates not /api/forms/templates. HR endpoints use /hr/time-off-requests and /hr/time-off-policies.

features: All field types (text, textarea, number, date, time, select, checkbox, radio, signature, GPS, photo, barcode, section, instructions)
Stats cards (Total, Pending, In Progress, Completed, Overdue)
Balance cards (Vacation, Sick Leave, Personal Day, Unpaid Leave)
Staff dashboard shows Forms, Tasks, Time Off cards
Admin dashboard shows Forms Builder, Task Management, Time Off cards
